About

I hold a Ph.D. in Computer Science from CUNY. Dissertation: "Geometric Graph Theory and Wireless Sensor Networks". My publications span combinatorics, graph theory and algorithms, computational geometry, algorithm design & analysis, sensor networks, and 3D image processing.

Worked at OkCupid as Senior Software Engineer, and at Google as a Software Engineer III in 3 different product areas; Maps Local Data, Corporate Engineering, and Technical Infrastructure: Security & Privacy. Before that, I was the Senior Data Scientist at a startup where I owned the web page topic classification stack end to end.

In 2021 I attended the 550+ hour Machine Learning Engineer Career Track Certificate Program of Springboard, where I completed my Capstone Project in NLP.

Starting in 2022, I held a Machine Learning Engineer position with RocketReach for 2 years where I built out various ML capabilities 0-to-1. I also had a recent stint at Meta's Reality Labs as an MLE where I worked on On-Device LLMs.

I enjoy engaging with music and reading books.

New York, NY · Hybrid

* Frame LLM Platformization: Data Intake. Built a notebook-based intake pipeline for Linguistic Engineers to use for handing off labeled training data to Software Engineers.
* Fitness Summaries. De-risked the use of a 500M-parameter LLM, obtained by applying Supervised Fine Tuning to Llama 3, in the generation of fitness summaries from measurements such as heart rate.
… more

 Python (Programming Language)

Machine Learning Engineer

RocketReach.co · Full-time

Mar 2022 - Jun 2024 · 2 yrs 4 mos

Bellevue, Washington, United States · Remote

One of two MLEs in a growing startup, a search engine to find professionals. Hired to tackle projects involving ML or that otherwise require deep analysis and creativity in a resource constrained setting. Here are some selected projects.

* Profile Recommendations: Pitched some versions of Collaborative Filtering and adapted 'item-item' based CF from an Amazon paper. Chose parameters carefully to have 'training' finish in under a day and with modest space consumption on 'Amazon-scale' data. Gathered requirements for and implemented a 'table stakes' post-filter. Mentored a Software Engineer through making a dashboard.

* Low Quality Profile Hiding: Created a training set by directing a data curation team to label person profiles as low quality or not. Performed signals engineering. Trained a classifier with extremely low False Positive Rate per the spec. Ran the classifier on 600 million profiles. A third of profiles are hidden from search results, making for a cleaner user experience.

* Offline Verification: Selected signals and trained an ML model to highlight the person profiles with a higher likelihood being looked up. Designed and implemented a weekly pipeline using this model and a configurable cache to pre-verify the desired quantity of profiles.

* Job Title Vectorization: Designed the protocol to select a vectorization scheme for job titles. Created and implemented the framework for method evaluation and threshold selection.

* Gave 7 talks internally, some about Machine Learning in general and others about ML projects.
… more
